text: Two thirds of an octopus's neurons are in its arms, letting each arm process touch and taste semi-independently.
A day on Venus lasts longer than a year on Venus because the planet rotates so slowly.
Sharks existed before trees; the first sharks appeared hundreds of millions of years ago.
Honeybees visit flowers and help pollinate many fruits, nuts, and vegetables.
The Moon appears bright at night because it reflects light from the Sun.
A compass needle points roughly north because it aligns with Earth's magnetic field.
